mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_coupon_verify (order_id, coupon_id, verify_status, unique_key, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{couponId}, #{verifyStatus}, #{uniqueKey}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.order_id, v.coupon_id, v.verify_status, v.verify_time, v.rollback_time, v.ext_msg, v.unique_key, v.create_time, v.update_time FROM order_coupon_verify v LEFT JOIN order_main o ON v.order_id = o.order_id WHERE v.verify_status = #{verifyStatus} AND (o.status != 'CREATED' OR o.status IS NULL)
